description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile sports car with a vibrant red exterior and black accents, including a prominent hood stripe, roof, and rear spoiler. The car features an aerodynamic design with sculpted side panels, aggressive front air intakes, and a wide stance. The rear showcases quad exhaust pipes, a detailed taillight assembly, and a visible Corvette emblem. The windows are tinted black, and the wheels are large, black, and multi-spoked, enhancing its performance-oriented appearance. The car has two doors and a streamlined roofline, typical of high-performance coupes. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet sturdy construction, optimized for speed and agility.
description: A red and black, low-slung sports car with aerodynamic lines, two doors, and a rear spoiler, featuring large black multi-spoke wheels and aggressive styling.
description_view_0: Rear view showing quad exhaust pipes, taillights, rear spoiler, and Corvette emblem.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sculpted side panels, black wheels, and door details.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the aggressive hood stripe, headlights, and wide stance.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the aerodynamic profile and black wheels.
